description: A client wants to use a new name for a product. An IP attorney needs to conduct a full trademark search to assess the risk of infringement.

nodes.task_description: Search the USPTO database for identical and phonetically similar marks.

expected_outcome.value: Agent performs a federal trademark search.

nodes.task_description: Search state trademark databases and common law sources (e.g., web search, business directories) for unregistered uses of the mark.

expected_outcome.value: Agent performs a more comprehensive search for other uses.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the search results to determine the likelihood of confusion with any existing marks.

expected_outcome.value: Agent assesses the risk of a potential infringement claim.

nodes.task_description: Draft an opinion letter to the client summarizing the search results and providing a risk assessment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides clear legal advice on whether it is safe to use the proposed name.
